summary: Red-team review signal for H08 transcript ingestion pipeline. Eight findings (no S4): six S2/S3 attack vectors and two S0/S1 hygiene items. All S2+ findings closed in-batch via fix actions H08-FIX-001..006 with regression tests (TestRedTeamRegressions). This is a non-authority review signal; control authority remains with CDE/SEL.

findings.description: Empty / whitespace-only transcript could silently produce a zero-turn payload that downstream consumers treat as valid.
findings.recommendation: Reject empty / whitespace-only input with reason_code EMPTY_TRANSCRIPT and require speaker_turns minItems: 1 in the schema.

findings.description: Pure prose without 'Speaker: text' delimiters could be admitted as a raw transcript with no structured turns, defeating downstream context bundle assembly.
findings.recommendation: Raise NO_SPEAKER_TURNS when no speaker line matches; schema rejects empty speaker_turns array.

findings.description: Oversize input could be opened and read into memory before any structural validation, exposing the runtime to denial-of-service via large transcripts.
findings.recommendation: Stat the file before reading and raise INPUT_FILE_TOO_LARGE above a 5 MiB cap.

findings.description: Non-UTF-8 bytes could leak UnicodeDecodeError into the PQX harness as EXECUTION_EXCEPTION with low diagnostic value.
Re-ingestion of the same file could mint a new artifact_id each run, breaking replay and creating duplicate downstream lineage.
findings.recommendation: Derive session_id and artifact_id deterministically from (filename, raw_text); rely on ArtifactStore.DUPLICATE_ARTIFACT_ID to fail-closed on replay.

findings.description: A hand-crafted artifact could be passed directly to ArtifactStore.register_artifact, bypassing PQX trace propagation.
findings.recommendation: Envelope check is already validated by the store; add a regression test (test_F006_direct_artifact_writes_blocked_by_envelope_check) to lock the behavior.

findings.description: trace_id / span_id format is validated by the schema only — the ingestor would happily build a payload with malformed trace if called outside the harness in tests.
findings.recommendation: Validate trace_id (32-hex) and span_id (16-hex) at the ingestor boundary with INVALID_TRACE_ID / INVALID_SPAN_ID reason codes.

findings.description: Module docstring does not explicitly state that content_hash is computed by the artifact store, not the ingestor.
findings.recommendation: Document the contract in the module docstring and at the ingest_transcript return-value comment.
